dashboard.label: Threat Intelligence
dashboard.description: BankStack Threat Intelligence — IOC Tracking, Geographic Analysis, TI-Enriched Alerts

search.query: index=bankstack_wazuh earliest=-24h | lookup threat_intel_ioc.csv ip AS data.srcip OUTPUT type AS ioc_type, severity AS ioc_severity | where isnotnull(ioc_type) | stats count
index=bankstack_wazuh earliest=-24h | lookup threat_intel_ioc.csv ip AS data.srcip OUTPUT severity AS ioc_severity | where ioc_severity="critical" | stats count
index=bankstack_wazuh earliest=-24h data.source_country=* | stats dc(data.source_country) AS unique_countries
index=bankstack_wazuh earliest=-24h action="SWIFT_MSG_SENT" | lookup threat_intel_ioc.csv ip AS data.receiver_bic OUTPUTNEW type AS bic_match | where isnotnull(bic_match) | stats count
index=bankstack_wazuh earliest=-7d | eval severity=case( rule.level>=14, "Critical", rule.level>=12, "High", rule.level>=8, "Medium", 1=1, "Low") | timechart span=6h count by severity
index=bankstack_wazuh earliest=-24h data.source_country=* | stats count by data.source_country | sort -count | head 15
index=bankstack_wazuh earliest=-24h rule.level>=10 | eval category=mvindex(rule.groups{}, 1) | stats count by category | sort -count | head 10

index=bankstack_wazuh earliest=-24h | lookup threat_intel_ioc.csv ip AS data.srcip OUTPUT type AS ioc_type, severity AS ioc_severity, description AS ioc_desc, source AS ioc_source | where isnotnull(ioc_type) | table _time, rule.level, rule.description, data.srcip, ioc_type, ioc_severity, ioc_desc, ioc_source | sort -_time | head 100

index=bankstack_wazuh earliest=-24h data.srcip=* | stats count, values(rule.description) AS alerts, max(rule.level) AS max_severity by data.srcip | sort -count | head 20 | lookup threat_intel_ioc.csv ip AS data.srcip OUTPUT severity AS ti_severity, description AS ti_desc | fillnull value="Clean" ti_severity | table data.srcip, count, max_severity, ti_severity, ti_desc, alerts
